name: OneMain Financial
description_short: OneMain Financial Las Vegas, Nevada — OneMain Financial offers fixed-rate personal loans from $1,500–$30,000 with terms of 24–60 months at 11.99%–35.99%...
description_long: OneMain Financial has served customers for over 100 years as a personal loan provider with both physical branch locations and online lending options. The company specializes in installment loans for debt consolidation, emergency expenses, auto purchases, and home improvements, with flexible terms designed to accommodate various financial situations. At their Miami W Flagler St branch and other locations nationwide, customers can apply in person, by phone, or online. The company emphasizes simplicity, transparency, and quick funding through their SpeedFunds program. OneMain offers both secured and unsecured personal loans, fixed interest rates, fixed monthly payments, and no prepayment penalties. Their loan specialists are available for one-on-one consultations during standard business hours (Monday–Friday with varying weekend closures) and now offer after-hours appointments to accommodate different schedules. The Miami branch is located at 8247 W Flagler St, Miami, FL 33144, and can be reached at (305) 262-4670. OneMain's loan products span auto purchases, debt consolidation, emergency loans, medical bills, home improvement, vacation expenses, and specialty financing (RV, boat, motorcycle, funeral loans). The company positions itself as a mainstream lender for individuals with varying credit profiles who need structured installment credit. However, the advertised APR range of 11.99%–35.99% is notably wide, indicating that rates vary significantly based on credit profile, loan amount, and term. The same-day funding (up to 1 hour after closing with SpeedFunds) is contingent on using an eligible bank-issued debit card and successful loan closing, which may not apply to all applicants or loan types.
address: 2021 N Rainbow Blvd #101, Las Vegas, NV 89108

company_info.headquarters: 2021 N Rainbow Blvd #101, Las Vegas, NV 89108

pros: Fixed interest rates and fixed monthly payments—no surprise rate increases or variable payments
No prepayment penalties, allowing early repayment without fees
Loan amounts from $1,500–$30,000 with flexible terms of 24–60 months
Same-day funding via SpeedFunds (as little as 1 hour after closing) for eligible customers
Prequalification available online, by phone, or in-branch without affecting credit score
After-hours appointments now available to accommodate working schedules
100+ years of operating history and established branch network nationwide
Wide range of loan purposes (debt consolidation, auto, medical, home improvement, specialty loans)
cons: APR range of 11.99%–35.99% is very wide, with highest tier exceeding 36% threshold; rates depend on creditworthiness
Minimum loan amount of $1,500 may not serve those needing smaller emergency loans
Branch hours are limited (closed Saturdays/Sundays; Tuesday/Thursday close at 5:30 pm), making access difficult for some schedules despite after-hours appointments being mentioned
Loan closing process requires multiple documents (proof of identity, residence, income) and may require additional documentation 'based on unique situation,' adding complexity
Same-day funding requires specific conditions (eligible bank-issued debit card, same-day closing) and is not guaranteed for all applicants
best_for: Borrowers seeking debt consolidation with fixed monthly payments and no prepayment penalties
Consumers with fair-to-good credit who need $1,500–$30,000 for planned expenses (home repairs, auto purchase, medical bills)
Individuals preferring traditional branch-based lending with personal loan specialist consultation
Borrowers who value transparency and want to avoid variable-rate or payday-style loans
diagnosis: OneMain Financial is best for borrowers with fair-to-good credit seeking $1,500–$30,000 in installment credit for consolidation, planned purchases, or emergencies who value fixed rates, no prepayment penalties, and personal service. The main caveat is the wide APR range (11.99%–35.99%), meaning actual rates depend heavily on creditworthiness; those with poor credit may face rates approaching 36%, while those with strong credit may qualify for competitive rates—applicants should check for prequalified offers before committing.
services: In-branch loan application with loan specialists
Same-day funding via SpeedFunds (with eligible debit card)
